findings.title: Required review input artifact is missing
findings.description: The review spec lists `swarm/features/run/gap-report.md` as a required input, but the file is absent in this worktree. Without it, scope and requirement-coverage cross-checks cannot be fully validated.
findings.suggested_fix: Add `swarm/features/run/gap-report.md` from dependency `gap-run` before final approval.

findings.title: Required test evidence artifact is missing
findings.description: The review spec requires `swarm/features/run/test-report.md`, but it is missing. This blocks evidence-based validation of intended test coverage for the merged feature changes.
findings.suggested_fix: Add `swarm/features/run/test-report.md` from dependency `tst-run` before final approval.

findings.title: Change adds logic to a file exceeding 800 lines
findings.description: `internal/watchdog/watchdog.go` is 2571 lines and this change introduces additional orchestration logic into it. Per review policy, files over 800 lines are a blocking maintainability risk because they reduce locality and increase regression surface.
findings.suggested_fix: Extract post-build gate evaluation and run-scope ticket generation helpers into smaller focused files/modules and keep `watchdog.go` below the size threshold.

findings.title: Change extends test file already over 800 lines
findings.description: `internal/watchdog/watchdog_test.go` is 1465 lines and the new test increases concentration in an already oversized file. This makes future test maintenance and fault isolation harder.
findings.suggested_fix: Split watchdog post-build tests into focused `_test.go` files by behavior area (e.g., post-build gating, spawn/idempotency, lifecycle integration).
